LAW AND MOTION, 302, APPLICANT INSURANCE COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO REOPEN PROCEEDINGS FOR LIMITED PURPOSE AND MOTION FOR ORDER APPROVING DISTRIBUTION OF SURPLUS RESERVES TO APPROVED CLAIMANTS. THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 22, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE RESPONDING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE RESPONDING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS RESPONSE TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489 (302/EHG)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-01-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT REJECTS THE TRUSTEE'S RESPONSE TO THE MOTION. THE REQUEST FOR AN ACCOUNTING IS UNTIMELY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion, And Motion To Reopen Proceedings For Limited Purpose And Motion For Order Approving Distribution Of Surplus Reserves To Approved Claimants
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joyce E. Hee, of Office of the Attorney General, Tel. 510.622.2227, for petitioners;
Anthony Friedman, of Levene, Neale, Bender, Yoo & Brill LLP, Tel. 310.229.1234, for Chapter 7 Trustee, David Gottlieb.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: APPLICANT INSURANCE COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS LIQUIDATOR OF COASTAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Reopen Proceedings For Limited Purpose And Motion For Order Approving Distribution Of Surplus Reserves To Approved Claimants is granted. The court rejects the trustee's response to the motion. The request for an accounting is untimely. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion, And Motion To Reopen Proceedings For Limited Purpose And Motion For Order Approving Distribution Of Surplus Reserves To Approved Claimants
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Jun-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: APPLICANT INSURANCE COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Reopen Proceedings For Limited Purpose And Motion For Order Approving Distribution Of Surplus Reserves To Approved Claimants. The motion is continued to June 22, 2015, to give the responding party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The responding party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its response to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
